scripts.dev: concurrently --names "api,front,worker" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run worker --prefix backend"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently --names "api,front" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run infra:up && sleep 3 && npm run migrate
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
